input: When you're searing the steak, you want the pan screaming hot. Put emphasis on screaming hot. Like, don't even touch it for the first two minutes.
ideal: When you're searing the steak, you want the pan SCREAMING HOT. Like, don't even touch it for the first two minutes.

input: The guitar solo in that track is good but it's not the main thing. Emphasize the bass line, that's what drives the whole song forward.
ideal: The guitar solo in that track is good but it's not the main thing. The BASS LINE, that's what drives the whole song forward.

input: We're looking at three properties this weekend and the location matters way more than square footage. Stress location, especially for resale value down the line.
ideal: We're looking at three properties this weekend and the LOCATION matters way more than square footage. Especially for resale value down the line.

input: The patient reported fatigue and joint pain but those are pretty common. With emphasis on the night sweats, that's what pushed us toward further testing.
ideal: The patient reported fatigue and joint pain but those are pretty common. The NIGHT SWEATS, that's what pushed us toward further testing.

input: For the raid tonight everyone needs to be on voice chat and have their consumables ready. Bold consumables, we wiped last time because people ran out of mana potions.
ideal: For the raid tonight everyone needs to be on voice chat and have their CONSUMABLES ready. We wiped last time because people ran out of mana potions.

input: The quarterly numbers look solid but I'm more worried about cash runway. Stress runway, that's what keeps me up at night.

input: When you're packing for a month in Southeast Asia, you really don't need much. Emphasis on lightweight layers, not heavy cotton stuff.
ideal: When you're packing for a month in Southeast Asia, you really don't need much. LIGHTWEIGHT LAYERS, not heavy cotton stuff.

input: The defense was solid all game but honestly the turnovers killed us. Make third quarter turnovers bold, that's where it fell apart.
ideal: The defense was solid all game but honestly the turnovers killed us. THIRD QUARTER TURNOVERS, that's where it fell apart.

input: For this recipe the technique matters more than the ingredients. Emphasize folding, not stirring, or you'll lose all the air.
ideal: For this recipe the technique matters more than the ingredients. FOLDING, not stirring, or you'll lose all the air.

input: The onboarding flow is functional but users are dropping off. Put emphasis on the email verification step, that's our biggest leak.
ideal: The onboarding flow is functional but users are dropping off. The EMAIL VERIFICATION STEP, that's our biggest leak.
